nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 佩里哈山脈
nodes.summary: 佩里哈山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联48种鸟类，包括Band-tailed guan、紫冠雉、Black-fronted wood quail等48种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Andean natural region
nodes.summary: Andean natural region是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括Rufous-headed pygmy tyrant、Variegated bristle tyrant、Golden-faced tyrannulet等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 纳里尼奥省
nodes.summary: 纳里尼奥省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括Dark-backed wood quail、苍蓬腿蜂鸟、盘尾蜂鸟等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Golden-faced tyrannulet
nodes.summary: Golden-faced tyrannulet（Golden-faced tyrannulet，学名 Zimmerius chrysops），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 圣马丁大区
nodes.summary: 圣马丁大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括茶腹隐蜂鸟、灰颏隐蜂鸟、皇领蜂鸟等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The golden-faced tyrannulet is found in the Andes of northwestern Venezuela, the Serranía del Perijá on the Venezuela-Colombia border, in all three ranges of the Colombian Andes except in the southwesternmost Nariño Department, and on the eastern Andean slope for the full length of Ecuador and into Peru as far as the Department of San Martín

links.evidence: The golden-faced tyrannulet is found in the Andes of northwestern Venezuela, the Serranía del Perijá on the Venezuela-Colombia border, in all three ranges of the Colombian Andes except in the southwesternmost Nariño Department, and on the eastern Andean slope for the full length of Ecuador and into Peru as far as the Department of San Martín

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the interior and edges of humid montane forest, secondary woodland, and semi-deciduous forest, and also coffee plantations and gardens

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the interior and edges of humid montane forest, secondary woodland, and semi-deciduous forest, and also coffee plantations and gardens
